description_long: This house features a square, fortress-like structure with four prominent cylindrical corner towers, each topped with a flat platform that has a circular recess. The main body of the house is blocky and robust, constructed from a uniform wood-like material, and sits on a patch of green grass. The front facade has a central arched doorway with a simple rectangular frame, while the other sides display double-door entrances with small circular cutouts. The roof is entirely flat, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements, and the overall design is minimalistic and geometric. There are no visible windows, giving the house a fortified, castle-inspired appearance. The structure appears solid and heavy, with clean, sharp edges and a smooth, matte finish.
description: A square, wood-like house with four cylindrical corner towers, flat roof, and arched central doorway, resembling a small fortress. The design is minimalistic, blocky, and windowless, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main arched doorway and two cylindrical towers flanking the entrance, with the flat roof and platforms clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view displays a double-door entrance with small circular cutouts and two corner towers, emphasizing the blocky, symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view reveals another double-door entrance with circular cutouts, similar to view 1, and the flat roof with corner platforms.
description_view_3: Back view highlights the symmetry of the structure, with the double-door entrance and all four towers visible, maintaining the fortress-like appearance.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway on the front, with simple rectangular frame and no decorative elements; other sides have double-door entrances with small circular cutouts.
